code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ bucket: Bucket) -> Bool
  if bucket.tokens >= 1
    mut b = bucket
    b.tokens = b.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let bucket = Bucket(tokens: 3)
  mut i = 0
  while i < 5
    if allow(bucket)
      print("ALLOW")
    else
      print("DENY")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
